questions.description: The auto-tagging pipeline (the multi-step MusicBrainz→Discogs→LLM process) has scattered non-persistent status indicators currently. The Assistant chat panel has its own sending/error state. Or do you mean a unified status for the whole app?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Auto-tagging pipeline (processAlbum → lookup chain → tag write)

options.label: Auto-tagging pipeline only
Assistant chat panel only
Both — unified status
All app operations (scan, save, audit, lyrics too)

questions.prompt: Where should the status live in the UI?
questions.description: The title bar is already crowded with buttons. A bottom status bar is common in Electron apps (like VS Code). Or a dedicated status icon area in the title bar.

options.label: Bottom status bar (like VS Code)
Icon/badge in title bar
Badge in the sidebar
Floating toast/notification (non-blocking)

questions.prompt: How should failures be shown and dismissed?
questions.description: Currently errors auto-dismiss after 5 seconds and appear briefly in the title bar. Users may miss them entirely — especially in batch operations where some albums fail and others succeed.
questions.recommendedAnswer: Persistent failure indicator with message, manually dismissable, plus auto-dismiss for transient warnings

options.label: Persist failure until user dismisses
Keep a history/log of recent failures
Auto-dismiss when next operation succeeds
Per-album failure tracking in batch mode

questions.prompt: How detailed should status messages be?
questions.recommendedAnswer: Current step + failure reason + which album/file

options.label: Current step name + failure reason + target
Full pipeline trace (which lookup failed, API status codes)
Just 'Working…' / 'Failed'

questions.prompt: What's in scope vs out of scope for this goal?
questions.recommendedAnswer: In scope: add a status bar component, wire auto-tag states to it, show persistent failures. Out of scope: redesigning the title bar, adding new backend events, analytics dashboards.

options.label: In scope: status bar component + wiring to existing states
In scope: persistent failure display (no more 5s auto-dismiss)
Out of scope: new backend event streams (use existing)
In scope: also wire audit and scan progress to same bar
Out of scope: redesigning title bar layout
